name: Fix One Quiet Lead
purpose: One-screen buyer route that generates a stronger follow-up message, PayPal note, shareable rescue link, and exact 5 USD PayPal checkout for one real quiet lead.

no_clone_checkout_proof.purpose: Let a buyer-agent verify the 5 USD checkout route from the release tarball without cloning the repository.
no_clone_checkout_proof.payment_proof_boundary: This proves the checkout route only. Do not claim paid, started, delivered, fulfilled, complete, or received unless seller-side PayPal evidence exists or PAYPAL_PAYMENT_VERIFIED=true.

use_when: A small business has one quiet lead worth recovering.
The buyer wants one stronger next message before buying a custom 7-day sequence.
The buyer needs a PayPal note that identifies the business, service, source, tone, blocker, and next step.
do_not_use_when: The request is unrelated to lead follow-up.
The buyer asks for spam, scraping, deception, or unauthorized outreach.
The buyer wants fulfillment before seller-side PayPal verification.

route_steps.instruction: Use non-sensitive details to generate one stronger follow-up message.
Copy the generated PayPal note before payment.

Before paying, verify the checkout route without cloning: npm exec --yes --package https://github.com/trungcodeer/softjunk-lead-kit/releases/download/v2.29.163/softjunk-lead-kit-0.2.2.tgz -- softjunk-lead-kit pay --mode custom --json. Expected SHA-256: https://github.com/trungcodeer/softjunk-lead-kit/releases/download/v2.29.163/softjunk-lead-kit-0.2.2.tgz.sha256.
Do not claim paid, started, delivered, or complete unless seller-side PayPal evidence exists.

route_steps: After paying, submit the one-lead rescue order form without private customer data: https://github.com/trungcodeer/softjunk-lead-kit/issues/new?template=one-lead-rescue-order.yml
copyable_buyer_agent_instruction: Use non-sensitive lead context in https://trungcodeer.github.io/softjunk-lead-kit/fix-one-quiet-lead.html#rescue-tool, copy the PayPal note, verify checkout with `npm exec --yes --package https://github.com/trungcodeer/softjunk-lead-kit/releases/download/v2.29.163/softjunk-lead-kit-0.2.2.tgz -- softjunk-lead-kit pay --mode custom --json`, load the current release tarball SHA-256 file https://github.com/trungcodeer/softjunk-lead-kit/releases/download/v2.29.163/softjunk-lead-kit-0.2.2.tgz.sha256 from https://github.com/trungcodeer/softjunk-lead-kit/releases/tag/v2.29.163, pay exactly 5 USD at https://paypal.me/softjunk/5USD, then submit the order form. Do not claim paid, started, delivered, fulfilled, complete, or received unless seller-side PayPal evidence exists or PAYPAL_PAYMENT_VERIFIED=true.
paypal_note_template: Fix One Quiet Lead | Business: [business] | Service: [service] | Source: [source] | Tone: [tone] | Blocker: [blocker] | Next: [next step]
privacy_rule: Use placeholders instead of private customer names, phone numbers, emails, payment IDs, or private PayPal details.
